Veterans Benefits: California offers disabled veteran property tax exemptions, a veterans property tax exemption, dependent college fee waivers, and a limited military retirement/SBP income exclusion for eligible taxpayers.
LGBTQSource: HRC MEI 2025 via City of Irvine
Description: Master-planned Orange County city with high housing costs, a strong medical technology and innovation economy, extensive parks, and quick access to the Santa Ana VA Clinic. City-level presidential results are liberal, though Irvine shifted about 4.4 points Republican on two-party presidential vote share from 2016 to 2024.
